DT.notes: Best overall return, near-optimal EV time

Greedy_Preempt.notes: Fastest EV but worst return (disrupts background traffic)

key_findings: DT achieves best overall return (-610.4) despite offline-only training
DT nearly matches greedy expert EV time (7.3 vs 7.1, only 2.8% slower)
DT reduces EV time by 62% vs Fixed-Time EVP (7.3 vs 19.2)
Return-conditioned offline training learns effective corridor strategies
